videos.title: Free disaster risk training courses you can take today | UNDRR
videos.description:

The UNDRR offers a wide range of on-demand training courses to help you build skills and advance your career in resilience and disaster risk reduction.

videos.title: What happens when disasters strike at the same time? | UNDRR
videos.description:
⚠️ What happens when disasters don’t come alone?
Most hazards are not isolated events. They interact, overlap, and escalate, creating complex and dangerous situations.

This video explains how different types of risk combine:

videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.title: Early warnings save lives: Building a world protected from disasters | UNDRR
videos.description:
🌍 Every second counts when disaster strikes.
From storms and floods to heatwaves, early warnings turn risk into action — saving lives and protecting livelihoods.

videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.title: Earthquakes are inevitable, disasters are not: A message from Kamal Kishore | UNDRR
videos.description:
🌍 Earthquakes are inevitable but the disasters they cause are not.

On the International Day in Memory of the Victims of Earthquakes, 29 April, Kamal Kishore, Special Representative of the UN Secretary-General for Disaster Risk Reduction, shares a powerful message of remembrance and resilience.

videos.title: Can a radio wake you up to save your life during a disaster? | UNDRR
videos.description:
📻⚠️ What if your radio could wake you up to save your life?

After the devastating 2021 floods in Germany’s Ahr Valley, one critical question emerged: How do you reach people quickly during a fast-moving disaster, especially at night?

videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.title: Happy European 112 Day! Strengthening the Lifeline: One Number, Every Emergency
videos.description:
Happy European 112 Day! 🇪🇺📞

On 11 February, we mark European 112 Day, raising awareness of the single European emergency number that connects citizens to life-saving assistance across Europe.

videos.title: The hidden danger of infrastructure collapse | UNDRR
videos.description:
⚠️ What happens when one critical system fails?

Modern societies depend on interconnected infrastructure—water, energy, sanitation, telecommunications, and transport. But these systems don’t operate in isolation.

🔗 One failure can trigger a chain reaction.
⚡ Power outages can disrupt water supply.
videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.title: How virtual reality is helping children prepare for floods in Nepal | UNDRR
videos.description:
🌊 What if children could experience a flood before it ever happens?

In Nepal, an innovative project is using virtual reality (VR) to help students prepare for disasters in a safe, immersive way.

Led by Binod Prasad Parajuli and the CRR Lab, this initiative recreates a digital twin of a school usin
videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.title: Engineers have created a tsunami in a lab | UNDRR
videos.description:
🌊 Scientists built a tsunami. In a lab.

Researchers at TU Delft are recreating tsunami waves to test their impact on buildings and coastal defences – and learning valuable lessons about improving coastal defences.
videos.channel: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction

videos.description:

videos.description:

videos.title: Unbreakable Updated: A global perspective on households' socioeconomic resilience to natural hazards
videos.description:
Risk assessments typically focus on asset losses to quantify the impacts of natural hazards, often neglecting distributional effects, the socioeconomic heterogeneity of the people affected, and the temporal dimension of reconstruction.

videos.title: In Pakistan, Amid Climate Disaster, IDA Works To Turn Despair Into Hope
videos.description: In 2022, a climate disaster hit Pakistan as devastating floods displaced millions of people, damaged some 2 million homes and left 70 percent of the country under water for weeks. videos.title: In Nepal, IDA Supports Resilience Of People & Infrastructure Following Devastating Earthquake
videos.description: The 2015 earthquake in Nepal displaced almost 3 million people and destroyed 800,000 houses.
